title: Buzz Aldrin's unexplained encounters revealed in Pentagon UFO file dump
description: The Apollo 11 astronaut said the crew witnessed three "unusual" unidentified phenomena during the Moon mission.

title: Trump releases previously classified UFO files
Trump releases previously classified UFO files
description: President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth today released dozens of previously classified files on alleged UFO sightings and alien life to provide what they called “unprecedented transparency” to the American people.

title: Pentagon drops UFO files and leaves the mystery wide open
description: The Pentagon has begun releasing a new batch of UFO or UAP records, including videos, cables and testimony from past sightings.

title: UFO files: See pictures the Pentagon released
description: Five photos from the landing site of NASA's Apollo 12 mission in 1969 were among the images released.
